reviews.comment:
Se quedó en el tiempo la estación de servicio del automóvil club argentino no hicieron refacciones no tenes buenas comodidades en el bar no tiene Full como todas las YPF

(Translated by Google)
The Argentine Automobile Club service station is stuck in time; they haven't done any renovations, the bar isn't very comfortable, and it doesn't have a full service like all the other YPF stations.
